name: ASRock B650M PG Riptide Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B650M PG Riptide Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe
description: ASRock B650M PG Riptide Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support and multiple M.2 slots.
